message:
feat: vendored crate improvements — tmux PDU pipeline, SSH config expansion, terminfo rendering, window EGL/WGL, codec updates

tmux_pty.rs: Major tmux PTY pipeline expansion for PDU pipelining.
tmux_commands.rs: Tmux command handling improvements.
tab.rs, termwiztermtab.rs: Tab and terminal wizard tab enhancements.
pane.rs: Pane type extensions.
mux/lib.rs: Mux library updates.

ssh/config.rs: SSH configuration parser expansion.
ssh/Cargo.toml: Dependency adjustments.

termwiz/render/terminfo.rs: Terminfo rendering improvements.
termwiz/readbuf.rs: Read buffer fix.

codec/src/lib.rs: Codec updates.
client/: Client, domain, and clientpane improvements.
config/derive, dynamic/derive: Derive macro attribute adjustments.

window/egl.rs: EGL context improvements.
window/os/macos/window.rs: macOS window enhancements.
window/os/windows/wgl.rs, window.rs: Windows WGL and window updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,6 +40,7 @@ libssh-rs = {workspace=true, features=["vendored"], optional = true}
 log.workspace = true
 portable-pty.workspace = true
 regex.workspace = true
+shell-words.workspace = true
 asupersync = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 async-channel = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 smol = { workspace = true, optional = true }
@@ -62,6 +63,5 @@ env_logger.workspace = true
 k9.workspace = true
 predicates.workspace = true
 rstest.workspace = true
-shell-words.workspace = true
 termwiz.workspace = true
 whoami.workspace = true
